docs_search.purpose: Gather current official documentation or version-sensitive references through read-only search and docs lookup.
docs_search.read_only_scope: official docs, current versions and reference lookup only
docs_search.rollback: disable experimental_enabled and fall back to local docs plus manual browsing only
when_not_to_use: tasks already covered by local docs

github.purpose: Inspect repositories, pull requests, issues or metadata when GitHub state matters.
github.read_only_scope: future repo, PR and issue inspection once a read-only surface is available
github.rollback: keep disabled until the connector exposes the read-only repository surface Atlas actually needs
when_not_to_use: changes that do not depend on GitHub state

filesystem.purpose: Access additional filesystem contexts when a task truly depends on files not already available through normal repo inspection.
filesystem.read_only_scope: explicit external paths and cross-workspace inventory only
filesystem.rollback: keep disabled and continue using normal repo access for local work
when_to_use: structured file inventory beyond the active workspace
when_not_to_use: tasks solvable with built-in local file access

engram.purpose: Persistent external memory for cross-session recall and structured knowledge retrieval.
engram.read_only_scope: memory lookup only, with no writes or sync enabled
engram.rollback: do not enable and continue using file-backed memory under memory/
when_to_use: future memory experiments when file-backed memory becomes insufficient
cross-session recall that cannot be handled by local markdown or JSON logs
when_not_to_use: tasks already covered by decision_log, session_summaries or breadcrumbs

web_search.purpose: Gather current external information or verify unstable facts.
web_search.read_only_scope: current facts and unstable external information
web_search.rollback: use only local context when web verification is not needed
when_not_to_use: tasks answerable from the repo alone

database_schema.purpose: Inspect database schema or metadata safely without touching data.
database_schema.read_only_scope: schema and metadata only, never business data or writes
database_schema.rollback: keep disabled and use static schema artifacts or manual review instead

docs.purpose: Consult authoritative documentation sources when local docs are insufficient.
docs.read_only_scope: official product and library documentation only
docs.rollback: fall back to local docs and explicit web verification only when needed
when_not_to_use: tasks already covered by local docs

analytics.purpose: Review metrics or telemetry summaries when evidence from analytics is needed.
analytics.read_only_scope: aggregated metrics and telemetry summaries only
analytics.rollback: keep disabled and rely on exported reports when metrics review is needed
